description: Manual entries override new-postals.json. marker_nudge: fine-tune after fly-to. calibration.affine: least-squares world X,Y → Leaflet lng,lat (fit via tools/fit-postal-affine.js + postals-ocr.json); when set, bounds linear mapping is skipped. worldLabelNudgeLat/Lng: small extra nudge on world-derived points only.
